mandarin-oriental-shanghai.description: Located on the banks of the Huangpu River, Mandarin Oriental Pudong, Shanghai offers the perfect combination of style, comfort and world-class service.

mandarin-oriental-shenzhen.description: Nestled above the city, Mandarin Oriental, Shenzhen offers sophisticated rooms, exceptional dining, and unparalleled well-being with breathtaking panoramic views.

mandarin-oriental-tokyo.descriptionZh: 东京文华东方酒店坐落于知名的日本桥区，以其精致奢华和屡获殊荣的服务而享有盛名。这是真正的美食目的地，提供优质的餐饮美食体验，同时可欣赏城市天际线和富士山的壮丽景色。

mandarin-oriental-london.description: Where two wonderful worlds converge. An iconic landmark that sits both on Knightsbridge and in Hyde Park.
mandarin-oriental-london.descriptionZh: 两个奇妙世界的精彩碰撞。骑士桥区和海德公园交汇地带的经典地标。

mandarin-oriental-paris.description: With a prime location on the Right Bank, Mandarin Oriental, Paris is a tribute to fashion and artistic creativity, infused with the brand's legendary service.

mandarin-oriental-lucerne.description: An iconic Belle Époque landmark, offering a premier luxury experience with stunning Lakefront views of the Swiss Alps, and unforgettable outdoor adventures.
mandarin-oriental-lucerne.descriptionZh: 酒店是“美好年代”的地标性建筑，坐拥瑞士阿尔卑斯山迷人的湖畔美景，提供尊贵奢华体验以及精彩刺激的户外探险活动。

mandarin-oriental-dubai.description: With a pristine seafront setting, Mandarin Oriental Jumeira, Dubai is a stylish urban resort overlooking the clear blue waters of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai’s glittering skyline, dominated by Burj Khalifa. The hotel's beachfront location and al fresco facilities are designed to bring a new level of relaxed luxury to the city.

mandarin-oriental-abu-dhabi.description: Located on a pristine private beach, Emirates Palace Mandarin Oriental is the epitome of luxury in Abu Dhabi.
mandarin-oriental-abu-dhabi.descriptionZh: 酋长宫殿文华东方酒店坐落在纯净的私人海滩，尽显阿布扎比的奢华魅力。

mandarin-oriental-doha.description: Mandarin Oriental, Doha is an intimate and stylish urban retreat located in the centre of Msheireb Downtown Doha, the lifestyle and cultural heart of the city.
mandarin-oriental-doha.descriptionZh: 多哈文华东方酒店地处多哈中央美夏尔城的优越位置，坐拥城市灿烂文化瑰宝和独特生活方式，融舒适惬意与现代时尚于一身，闹中取静，为您打造一方沙漠中的绿洲。

mandarin-oriental-zurich.description: Mandarin Oriental Savoy, Zurich is a Forbes Travel Guide Five-Star destination in the heart of the city, offering gourmet dining and memorable experiences around Lake Zurich and its Old Town.
mandarin-oriental-zurich.descriptionZh: 苏黎世萨沃伊文华东方酒店坐落于城市中心，荣膺《福布斯旅游指南》五星评级，宾客可以在苏黎世湖和老城区周围品尝精致美食，获享难忘体验。

mandarin-oriental-amsterdam.description: Adjacent to some of Amsterdam's cultural hotspots, Mandarin Oriental Conservatorium, Amsterdam began as a bank and soon after a music school. Now the 5-star living room of Amsterdam, and a beloved landmark in the city.
mandarin-oriental-amsterdam.descriptionZh: 阿姆斯特丹音乐学院文华东方酒店毗邻城中多处文化名胜，该建筑最初为一家银行，后又改为一所音乐学院。如今则华丽转型为阿姆斯特丹的豪华起居之地，更是这座城市的热门景点。

mandarin-oriental-istanbul.description: Mandarin Oriental Bosphorus, Istanbul epitomizes luxury, offering an unparalleled sanctuary of opulence and grandeur in an illustrious urban resort.

mandarin-oriental-mallorca.descriptionZh: 马略卡岛蓬塔内格拉文华东方酒店坐拥波塔尔斯港(Puerto Portals)的迷人景观，将优雅韵味与马略卡岛的自然美景巧妙融合。精心策划的体验、充满活力的用餐时光和焕活水疗仪式彰显马略卡岛的跃动韵律，每一种体验都邀请宾客以真实且富有沉浸感的方式，感受这座岛屿的魅力。

mandarin-oriental-landmark-hong-kong.description: In the heart of Central, Mandarin Oriental The Landmark, Hong Kong is a gateway to what’s next. ritz-carlton-singapore.description: The Ritz-Carlton, Millenia Singapore is renowned for panoramic views from its spacious guestrooms and suites, together with award-winning hospitality synonymous with The Ritz-Carlton brand. Our luxury hotel Singapore, Marina Bay features a Club Lounge with five daily culinary presentations and all-day champagne. Restaurants include Colony, offering a culinary journey through Singapore's heritage, and the one-Michelin-star Summer Pavilion for authentic Cantonese cuisine. Enjoy an afternoon beneath the skylight of The Ritz Lounge, followed by 1960s-inspired cocktails at the award-winning Republic bar. EPICUTIS® facials and ESPA body treatments are available at The Ritz-Carlton Spa, while octagonal bathroom windows frame stunning skyline views, making it a perfect romantic luxury hotel in Marina Bay Singapore for couples' getaways and indulgent escapes. Kindly note that our hotel does not participate in Marriott Bonvoy.

ritz-carlton-chicago.description: The Ritz-Carlton, Chicago, offers an iconic address that unites the city, lake, and sky in a vibrant and luxurious setting on Chicago's Gold Coast. Our hotel legacy lives through generations of families, travelers, and trailblazers, providing a coveted setting to enjoy what matters most. Cherished heritage, community soul, landmark service, and Midwest sincerity are all to be found at this luxury hotel in Chicago. Our beacon of hospitality is the backdrop for new and established voices in connecting, reconnecting and uncovering the dynamic energy of Chicago.

ritz-carlton-boston.description: Perfectly situated in the heart of downtown Boston, The Ritz-Carlton, Boston offers guests an unmatched blend of refinement and comfort. Boston proudly claims the distinguished honor as the inaugural home of The Ritz-Carlton brand in the United States, a legacy that has flourished since its inception in 1927, continually redefining the art of luxurious hospitality. Relax in our hotel suites in downtown Boston. Elevate your senses in our Boston luxury accommodation amidst the panoramic cityscape views from our 193 lavishly appointed rooms and suites. Our contemporary meeting space floor provides a versatile backdrop for meetings, weddings, and special events. Savor decadent cuisine at our hotel's New England-inspired bistro, Artisan Bistro, and enjoy craft cocktails at our sophisticated lobby lounge, Avery Bar.
